JUDGE: ELLEN CHAITIN. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. JUDGMENT SIGNED (PLEASE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).(220)
PLAINTIFF MARKUS WILLIAMS TRIAL BRIEF FOR SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL DE NOVO.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2002 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM

JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER JOE VICKSTEIN. MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2002 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON DEC-18-2002 AT 9:45 AM IN DEPT. 220.

COURT TRIAL(TRIAL DE NOVO) ON DEC-18-2002 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON DEC-18-02 BY JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. MATTER WAS NOT REPORTED.(220)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT WILLIAMS, MARKUS RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SMITH, BRUCE A. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
